name: GAF_SyteLine_JobSearch_Tool_v1
description: Search for existing standard jobs (BOMs) in SyteLine by item code

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLJobs
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Comma-separated list of properties to return. Use: Job,Suffix,Item,Type,Stat,QtyReleased,Whse,_ItemId
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: SQL WHERE clause. Always include Type = 'S' for standard jobs. Examples: Type = 'S' AND Item = 'FA-20000' or Type = 'S' AND Item LIKE 'MB%'
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Maximum number of records to return. Default: 10
Example Request:
Search for standard job by item:
GET /load/SLJobs?properties=Job,Suffix,Item,Type,Stat,QtyReleased,Whse,_ItemId&filter=Type = 'S' AND Item = 'FA-20000'&recordCap=5
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array with job records.
Key Response Fields:
- Items: Array of job objects (empty array if not found)
- Job: Job number (NumSortedString, 10 chars, left-padded with spaces)
- Suffix: Job suffix (0 for standard)
- Item: Item code this job belongs to
- Type: 'S' = Standard (BOM template)
- Stat: Job status ('F' = Firm)
- _ItemId: Record identifier for updates
- Success: Boolean indicating API call success
If no jobs match, Items will be an empty array.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Use this tool to search for existing standard jobs (BOM containers) in SyteLine.
A standard job (Type='S') defines the routing and materials for an item.
Always include Type = 'S' in the filter to only find standard jobs.
Search by item code: filter=Type = 'S' AND Item = 'ITEM-CODE'
Returns job details including the Job number needed for routing and material operations.

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
